title: SDN 208 DOC__EX33 Testing
fullText: EX33 Testing User profile config Scenarios Scenario 1: User is configured to pick up 3 totes, only 1 task released User ctrl-s s into single task , only one task released so only one task is picked up. No master task is formed due to no tasks to merge. Scenario 2 : User is configured to pick up 3 totes, only 2 task released User ctrl-s s into MASTER task, only two task s released so only two task s are picked up . Scenario 3 : User is configured to pick up 3 totes, 3 task released User ctrl-s s into MASTER task, only two tasks released so only two tasks are picked up. Original tasks are cancelled Scenario 4 : User DOES CTRL-S, no tasks released User ctrl-s s into single task, only one task released so only one task is picked up. No master task is formed due to no tasks to merge. Single -tote Scenarios Scenario 1: User packs out s ingle tote in full User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode. User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 2 : User packs out s ingle tote in full using Ctrl-L Location scan User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref and DOES CTRL-l for location scan User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 3 : User packs out s ingle tote and does a partial short User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref and item barcode User confirms PARTIAL qty , uses ctrl-d to short remaining , tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 4 : User packs out s ingle tote and does a FULL short User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref a nd on item barcode scan does ctrl-d for full short Task is in c ancelled s tatus. Scenario 5 : User packs out s ingle tote and does a ctrl-e User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref and on item barcode scan User picks partial qty then does ctrl-e to end tote User Confirms tote confirmation screen and end of oLPN message User scans new xref, item barcode scan and confirms qty User confirms tote confirmation screen and end of oLPN message Task is in c omplete s tatus. Scenario 6 : User packs out s ingle tote and does a short then ctrl-e User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref and on item barcode scan. User picks partial qty AND SHORTS REMAINDER User Confirms tote confirmation screen and end of oLPN message User scans next item barcode and picks partial qty User does ctrl-e , confirms tote confirmation screen and end of oLPN message Scans new xref, item barcode scan and confirms qty User confirms tote confirmation screen and end of oLPN message Task is in c omplete s tatus. oLPN with shorts is in packing status and completed oLPN is packed. Scenario 7 : User packs out s ingle tote with multiple items in full User ctrl-s s into single task User confirms size type screen, scans xref and on item barcode scan. User picks items in full Task is in c omplete s tatus. oLPN with shorts is in packing status and completed oLPN is packed. Multi-tote Scenarios Ctrl-W on to te screen Scenario 1: Ctrl-W on tote scans User scans tote 1 and uses ctrl-W to see previous scan, tote is already populated and needs to be confirmed again. Scenario 2 : User attempts to scan a tote already scanned. User scans tote 1 with a tote already scanned. User gets custom error message and is prompted for tote scan again. Prompted to scan a new tote again. Scenario 3 : User SCANS two totes and uses ctrl-W User scans tote s 1 and 2 u ses ctrl-W to see previous scan s , tote is already populated and needs to be confirmed again. On tote 3 scan, user does ctrl-w twice Once confirmed, user is promtped again for tote 3 scan Multi-tote Scenarios Scenario 1: User picks two t otes in full User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode. User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 2 : User picks two t otes shorting both in full User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode. User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 3 : User picks two t otes shorting 1 in full User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode shorting item 1 in full and picking item 2 in full. Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 4 : User picks two t otes shorting 1 in partial. User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode shorting item 1 in partial and picking item 2 in full. Scenario 5 : User picks two t otes PICKING both in full, using ctrl-e on 1 tote . User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode picking 1 item in full and using ctrl-e on second item. Picks second item in partial. User does ctrl-e on th is screen Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 6 : User picks two t otes PICKING both in full, using ctrl-e on 1 tote and shorting . User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode picking 1 item in full and using ctrl-e on second item. Picks second item in partial shorting the remainder after ctrl-e . User does ctrl-e on th is screen User does ctrl-d on this screen Task is in complete s tatus. Only enter Qty Scenarios Scenario 1: User picks one t ote in full User ctrl-s into master task, ONE totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and CONFIRMS ITEM qty tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Scenario 2 : User picks one t ote and shorts it in fu ll User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and does ctrl-d at item qty screen User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Scenario 3 : Forced to scan item barcode User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and does ctrl-d at item qty screen User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message for all items. Forced item barcode scan on item due to ref_num5 = 1 on item 2. Task is compelte. Scenario 4 : User picks one t ote and shorts it in partial User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and does A PARTIAL SCAN . User confirms partial qty and ctrl-d the remainder , tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete status Scenario 5 : User picks one t ote and does ctrl-e User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and does A PARTIAL SCAN. Racetrack Flow Scenarios Scenario 1: User picks three t ote in full , 6 tasks released . Continues where previously ended User ctrl-s into master task, 3 totes released end picking at location RA02654. Us er picks all items in full and is prompted for next master task User begins next master task where previous task left off Scenario 2 : User picks three t ote in full, 6 tasks released . Continues at next closest location. User ctrl-s into master task, 3 totes released end picking at location R B23753. User picks all items in full and is prompted for next master task . User begins next master task at the next closest location in ascending order. Follows pick path from beginning after first pick is complete

Scenario 2 : User picks two t otes shorting both in full User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode. User confirms full qty, tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 3 : User picks two t otes shorting 1 in full User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode shorting item 1 in full and picking item 2 in full. Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 4 : User picks two t otes shorting 1 in partial. User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. 1 in full and picking item 2 in full. Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 4 : User picks two t otes shorting 1 in partial. User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode shorting item 1 in partial and picking item 2 in full.

Scenario 5 : User picks two t otes PICKING both in full, using ctrl-e on 1 tote . User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and scans item barcode picking 1 item in full and using ctrl-e on second item. Picks second item in partial. User does ctrl-e on th is screen Task is in complete s tatus. Scenario 6 : User picks two t otes PICKING both in full, using ctrl-e on 1 tote and shorting . Picks second item in partial shorting the remainder after ctrl-e . User does ctrl-e on th is screen User does ctrl-d on this screen Task is in complete s tatus. Forced item barcode scan on item due to ref_num5 = 1 on item 2. Task is compelte. Scenario 4 : User picks one t ote and shorts it in partial User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. User confirms size type screen, scans xref and does A PARTIAL SCAN . User confirms partial qty and ctrl-d the remainder , tote confirmations screen and end of oLPN message Task is in complete status Scenario 5 : User picks one t ote and does ctrl-e User ctrl-s s into master task, two totes released. Continues where previously ended User ctrl-s into master task, 3 totes released end picking at location RA02654.
